02_class_distribution.note_entropy: 100% means perfectly balanced; lower = more skewed

12_eta_squared.description: Proportion of total feature variance explained by class membership.

14_fisher_discriminant_ratio.description: Higher ratio = stronger class separation. Equivalent to the F-statistic in ANOVA.

16_mutual_information.description: Mutual information between each feature and the target label (higher = more informative).

23_feature_variance_decomposition.description: % of each feature's variance explained by class membership vs within-class spread.

26_feature_ranking_consensus.description: Consensus rank = average of Kruskal-Wallis, Random Forest MDI, and Mutual Information ranks.

27_MASTER_SUMMARY.project: Mindspace Voice Agent — Mental Health Classification EDA
